input.document: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady at its June meeting, citing persistent inflation and a resilient labor market. Officials signaled one possible cut later in the year.

reference: Fed held rates steady, hinting at one possible cut.
context: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady at its June meeting, citing persistent inflation and a resilient labor market. Officials signaled one possible cut later in the year.

input.document: A startup raised $40M in Series B funding to expand its developer platform. The round was led by a growth fund with participation from existing investors.

reference: Startup raised $40M Series B to expand its platform.
context: A startup raised $40M in Series B funding to expand its developer platform. The round was led by a growth fund with participation from existing investors.

input.document: The retailer reported quarterly revenue of $5.2B, up 8% year over year, driven by strong e-commerce growth and improved margins.

reference: Retailer posted $5.2B revenue, up 8%, on e-commerce strength.
context: The retailer reported quarterly revenue of $5.2B, up 8% year over year, driven by strong e-commerce growth and improved margins.
